scripts.build: pnpm --filter @zhixu/core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-os build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/config build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/skill-runtime build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/document-intelligence build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/artifact-factory build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/model-gateway build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/coaching build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/grad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/research build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/undergrad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/efficiency build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/collab build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @zhixu/core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-os build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/skill-runtime build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/document-intelligence build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/artifact-factory build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/model-gateway build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/coaching build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/grad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/research build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/undergrad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/efficiency build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/collab build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @zhixu/core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/agent-os build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/config build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/skill-runtime build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/document-intelligence build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/artifact-factory build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/model-gateway build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/coaching build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/grad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/research build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/undergrad build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/efficiency build && pnpm --filter @zhixu/collab build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
